channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats Abandon the Me Too Movement
item.description: Graham Platner's rise reveals the emptiness of the 'Believe women' slogan.

item.title: Epstein files crusade derails Nancy Mace's campaign
item.description: GOP Rep. Nancy Mace lost her bid for South Carolina governor, attributing the defeat to her vote to release the Epstein files.

item.title: Iran, the latest 'cakewalk'
item.description: The regime proved more resilient than expected, and the Trump administration now faces the fallout.

item.title: EEOC's broad 'disparate impact' interpretation violated civil rights law, DOJ says
item.description: The Justice Department found that the EEOC violated federal civil rights law by issuing guidelines that pressured companies...
